## Related issue

Link the issue, if one exists.

## Summary

Explain the proposed change and why it is needed.

## Testing

Describe exactly how and where the change was tested.

## Risks

Describe any compatibility, security, privacy, update, database, or deployment risks.

## Safety checklist

- [ ] I tested this change away from SimHaven's live environment.
- [ ] I did not include credentials, live configuration, player data, logs, databases, backups, or deployment files.
- [ ] I did not include Electronic Arts game data.
- [ ] I did not include SimHaven's licensed Discord bot or any of its files.
- [ ] I documented the purpose, source, and license of any new dependency.
- [ ] I reviewed any changes to authentication, networking, updating, dependencies, scripts, or GitHub workflows.
- [ ] I preserved applicable FreeSO and third-party copyright and license notices.

## Screenshots

Add screenshots when they materially help explain the change. Make sure they contain no private information.
